title: micromeria microphylla var. villosa
intro: Micromeria microphylla var. villosa, also known as Corsican pennyroyal, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Micromeria microphylla var. villosa include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce fever, as well as its potential to act as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Micromeria microphylla var. villosa include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
